prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.7 kg; Height 176.3 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.7%; 9 months ago 12.0%; 6 months ago 12.0%; 3 months ago 11.5%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 260mg/dL; 9 months ago 273mg/dL; 6 months ago 320mg/dL; 3 months ago 262mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.2kg; 9 months ago 59.9kg; 6 months ago 58.3kg; 3 months ago 54.9kg; current 58.7kg), Height (12 months ago 176.3cm; 9 months ago 176.3cm; 6 months ago 176.3cm; 3 months ago 176.3cm; current 176.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 67U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 63U/L), AST (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 69U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 67U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 20mg/g; 9 months ago 21mg/g; 6 months ago 22mg/g; 3 months ago 23mg/g; current 31mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.55 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
